prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, develop a specific protein binder targeting ERBB2 (Kinase) expressed by Homo sapiens. The binder should achieve nanomolar affinity. outline a methodology for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using AlphaFold2, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: ERBB2; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
